subject: REVISED M3: Fix Evidence Span Storage (In-Memory → DB)
description:
CRITICAL FIX: EvidenceSpan model exists in DB but spans.py uses _spans dict (in-memory). This is a major inconsistency.

APPROACH:
1. Rewrite apps/api/src/islam_intelligent/api/routes/spans.py to use EvidenceSpan SQLAlchemy model
2. Remove _spans dict and _span_counter
3. Use database UUIDs, not generated IDs
4. Update all span tests to use DB

ACCEPTANCE:
- No in-memory _spans dict
- All span CRUD uses EvidenceSpan model
- UUIDs from database
- Tests updated for DB persistence
- Span routes work with evidence.py (which already uses DB)
